titleZh: AI囚徒：当算法成为枷锁，智能时代的人们如何重新发现自我？

descriptionEn: However, as evangelists like Luo Zhenyu and Liu Run, along with internet moguls such as Fu Sheng and Zhou Hongyi, fervently champion AI, intelligent agents, and even various "lobster farming" trends, nearly everyone is swept into the cage of AI.
